;<span id="Sibling">sibling</span>
:[[Glossary:Element|element]] in the [[Glossary:Contents_window|'''Contents''' window]] that is located on the same level of the [[Glossary:Knowledge_tree|knowledge tree]] as the element in question.
:See also:
:*[[Building the knowledge tree]]
:*[[Contents|'''Contents''' window]]
:*[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tree_(data_structure) Tree structure] at Wikipedia
